item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8150-1: SPIP vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8150-1: SPIP vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that SPIP did not properly sanitize certain inputs. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to perform cross site scripting. (CVE-2022-28959) It was discovered that SPIP did not properly sanitize certain inputs. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to perform PHP injection attacks. (CVE-2022-28960) It was discovered that SPIP did not properly sanitize certain inputs. A remote atta...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8150-1

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-31405 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-31405 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: media: dvb-net: fix OOB access in ULE extension header tables The ule_mandatory_ext_handlers[] and ule_optional_ext_handlers[] tables in handle_one_ule_extension() are declared with 255 elements (valid indices 0-254), but the index htype is derived from network-controlled data as (ule_sndu_type & 0x00FF), giving a range of 0-255. When htype equals 25...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31405

item.title: [Segurança] ⚡ Weekly Recap: Axios Hack, Chrome 0-Day, Fortinet Exploits, Paragon Spyware and More
item.description:
💣 ⚡ Weekly Recap: Axios Hack, Chrome 0-Day, Fortinet Exploits, Paragon Spyware and More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Active bugs showed up in the tools people use every day. Some attacks didn’t even need much effort because the path was already there. What starts small can reach a lot of systems fast.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/weekly-recap-axios-hack-chrome-0-day.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Hackers Exploit Fake Microsoft Teams Domains to Deliver Malicious Payloads - cyberpress.org
item.description:
💣 Hackers Exploit Fake Microsoft Teams Domains to Deliver Malicious Payloads - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.

item.title: [Segurança] Why Simple Breach Monitoring is No Longer Enough
item.description:
📰 Why Simple Breach Monitoring is No Longer Enough
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Infostealers are harvesting credentials and session cookies at scale, bypassing traditional defenses. Lunar explains why simple breach monitoring alone can't keep up with modern credential-based attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/why-simple-breach-monitoring-is-no-longer-enough/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Axios npm hack used fake Teams error fix to hijack maintainer account - BleepingComputer

Ferramenta: Office
